title: Private updates / choosing audience for updates
excerpt: I would like the ability to choose the audience for each update (to include/exclude individual users). For example, sometimes I post updates that I would like to be only visible to me, for my personal reference, or for o…

posts.author: hbeckett (Haley Beckett)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like the ability to choose the audience for each update (to include/exclude individual users). For example, sometimes I post updates that I would like to be only visible to me, for my personal reference, or for only certain people on my team.
